# Support

<!-- [DOXYGEN] -->

If you are stuck with a problem using this project or have questions, please get in touch at our [Issues]
or [Discussions]. We'd love to help.

You can save time by following this procedure when reporting a problem:

- Do try to solve the problem on your own first.
- Search through past [Issues] and [Discussions] to see if someone else already had the same problem.
- Before filing a bug report, try to create a minimal reproducible example (MRE) that reproduces the problem.
  It is much easier to identify the cause for the problem if a handful of lines suffice to show that something is not
  working.

[Issues]: https://github.com/iqm-finland/QDMI-on-IQM/issues
[Discussions]: https://github.com/iqm-finland/QDMI-on-IQM/discussions
